name: Tomato Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble the pasta machine with the desired pasta shape die.
2. Place the flour into the pasta machine.
3. Turn the machine to MIX and combine the liquid ingredients (eggs, tomato paste, olive oil) slowly with the flour in the machine.
4. Turn the machine to EXTRUDE and cut the dough to the desired lengths.
5. Cook for 2 minutes or until dry, then cook dried pasta about 10 minutes.
6. Serve with Tomato-alfredo sauce.
